systemic_low_risk_field_solidification_e.strength_term: A_sys_field_solid = mix(S_sys_field_cons_score, R_sys_field_cons, 1 - P_sys_field_cons, M_brain_direct_v34, R_train_v40)
systemic_low_risk_field_solidification_e.learning_term: L_sys_field_solid = mix(L_sys_field_cons, S_sys_field_cons_score, D_feature_v34, B_plastic_v40, R_train_v40)
systemic_low_risk_field_solidification_e.system_term: M_sys_field_solid = A_sys_field_solid + S_sys_field_solid + R_sys_field_solid + L_sys_field_solid - P_sys_field_cons

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk field solidification validation checks whether the consolidated low-risk field begins solidifying instead of only staying reinforced by short-horizon support.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this solidified low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
